verdict: supported_subset — stagnation confirmed (mean growth 0.96%); ≤1 of 4 canonical wellbeing indicators degraded. Cantril ladder NOT on disk; canonical basket coverage 6/7 (Gallup WHR fetcher not landed). NOT graded SUPPORTED because the canonical basket is incomplete.
v2_correction: v1 SUPPORTED was indicator-gamed: chosen 3-indicator subset (LE+unemp+Gini) omitted the canonical wellbeing dimensions where Japan's stagnation visibly damaged outcomes — fertility (1.54→1.36, ~12% decline), suicide rate (peak ~24/100k 1998-2003), and effectively excluded subjective life satisfaction (Cantril ladder, Gallup WHR not on disk). v2 requires the canonical basket per OECD Better Life / WHR / UNDP HDI extensions.

fetcher_backlog.needed: annual subjective life satisfaction by country, 2006-present
